name: rca
description: Codex plugin shell for the RedCube AI visual deliverable domain app.

interface.shortDescription: Agent-first visual deliverable domain app for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds a thin Codex plugin entry for RedCube AI while preserving the existing CLI, gateway contracts, and same-session deliverable loop surfaces.
defaultPrompt: Open the RedCube AI frontdesk for this workspace.
Inspect the current RedCube product-entry manifest.
Continue the active RedCube deliverable loop in the same entry session.
